name: Ali Nasiripour
summary: IT Infrastructure Specialist with 5 years of experience delivering enterprise-grade technical support and cloud infrastructure management across multi-site environments. Skilled in administering hybrid Azure/on-premises environments, Microsoft 365, Cisco Meraki networking, and leading IT projects from design through delivery. Experienced escalation resource for complex infrastructure challenges with a client-focused, documentation-driven approach. AWS Solutions Architect certified with a track record of improving operational efficiency through automation and structured project execution.
skills: Azure (VMs, VPN Gateway, Entra ID, Blob Storage)
Windows Server / Active Directory / DNS / DHCP / GPO

experience.title: Disaster Recovery / Backup Engineer
bullets: Provision and manage Azure-hosted infrastructure including Virtual Machines, VPN Gateways, Blob Storage, and Entra ID integrations, delivering consistent hybrid cloud environments across 50+ locations.
Administer Cisco Meraki full-stack deployments (MX/MS/MR) including firmware rollouts, VLAN segmentation, and Meraki Dashboard monitoring across hotel and resort properties.
Lead network refresh IT projects end-to-end: site surveys, hardware procurement, VLAN redesign, staging, and cutover coordination with on-site teams.
Serve as Tier 3 escalation resource for complex routing, firewall, VPN, and authentication incidents across all supported multi-site environments.
Administer Windows Server, Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and Group Policy to maintain consistent security and identity management standards.
Develop comprehensive SOPs, runbooks, and disaster recovery documentation to support knowledge transfer and operational continuity.
Automate operational workflows using PowerShell and Power Automate to reduce manual overhead and improve team efficiency.
Manage server hardware lifecycle including procurement, staging, firmware updates, and decommissioning across distributed data closets.

experience.title: Network Analyst
bullets: Deployed and managed Cisco Meraki wireless and switching infrastructure at multiple properties, configuring SSIDs, traffic shaping, and guest network isolation via Meraki Dashboard.
Managed Azure cloud instances including VM provisioning and VPN tunnel configuration, maintaining hosted workloads with high availability.
Administered Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and Group Policy across multi-site Windows Server environments.
Led full network modernization project at Grouse Mountain Resort, replacing aging infrastructure with current-generation Meraki and Sophos equipment.
Implemented RADIUS authentication to enhance access control and strengthen on-premises security posture.
Automated repetitive operational tasks using PowerShell to improve efficiency and reduce manual overhead.
Provided end-user and application support across all supported locations, including remote and on-site troubleshooting for a broad range of systems and platforms.

experience.title: IT Network Administrator
bullets: Promoted to permanent role after a successful internship, expanding responsibilities across Windows Server, network hardware, and firewall infrastructure.
Managed system patching, OS updates, and virtualization environments; maintained hybrid backup environments and contributed to disaster recovery readiness.

experience.title: Customer Support
bullets: Delivered technical support in a high-volume environment; diagnosed connectivity and device issues with a focus on customer satisfaction and clear communication.
